weeklyModal.headline: <accent>Wednesday boost on The AI Model Lab!</accent> Every Wednesday, subscribers get an exclusive <accent>{amount} free videos</accent> to claim.
weeklyModal.step1Desc: Open all day long, 00:00 to 23:59 (Brasília time).
weeklyModal.step2Desc: You need to click claim to receive. Doesn't carry over between weeks.
weeklyModal.step3Desc: Generations become available instantly on Veo 3.1 Fast.
